summary: Completed testing of Live Opportunity Feed feature. Backend: 16/16 API tests passed. All 3 opportunity feed endpoints working correctly. Frontend component code verified. Dashboard UI requires authentication (Supabase rate limiting prevents login testing).
passed_tests: Feed events have all required fields (id, event_type, priority, created_at, product_id, product_name, launch_score, reason, color, icon, confidence)
Event types are valid (entered_strong_launch, new_high_score, trend_spike, competition_increase, approaching_saturation)
Stats contain total_events, last_24h, by_type fields
Feed events are sorted by priority
Feed events have valid ISO timestamps
Feed events have complete product data
Event colors are valid (green, emerald, blue, amber, red)
critical_code_review_comments: OpportunityFeedPanel now exported from /app/frontend/src/components/dashboard/index.js for consistency
Feed service correctly implements deduplication (4-hour window for same event type + product)
Frontend component uses correct API URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL environment variable
seed_data_creation: 7 feed events already exist in database (5 entered_strong_launch, 2 trend_spike)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Opportunity Feed fully implemented. Backend endpoints: GET /api/dashboard/opportunity-feed (list events), GET /api/dashboard/opportunity-feed/stats (statistics), POST /api/dashboard/opportunity-feed/generate-sample (admin - requires X-API-Key header). Frontend: OpportunityFeedPanel.jsx integrated as Feed tab in Intelligence Dashboard. Dedup logic prevents duplicate events for same product within 4 hours.

frontend_verification.dashboard_integration: Feed tab added to Intelligence Dashboard tabs (line 509-535 in DashboardPage.jsx)
